message:
fix(combinator): adaptive hedge warmup threshold respects small configured windows

src/combinator/hedge.rs — next_hedge_delay warmup threshold changed from
hardcoded 10 to min(history.len(), 10), so that small configured history
windows (e.g., capacity 5) become usable once fully populated rather than
waiting forever for 10 samples that can never arrive. Added test
test_adaptive_hedge_policy_small_window_calibrates_once_full verifying that
a window of size 5 begins producing hedge delays after 5 observations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
